tooltips.geometryField: The geometry field on related records to export, e.g. parcelGeometry.
tooltips.buttonLabel: Text shown on the download action button.
tooltips.droneRestrictionsEnabled: Adds the GeoPlateforme/DGAC drone restriction map layer. When enabled, users can inspect nearby restrictions while panning the map, click the overlay for live restriction details, and run polygon-overlap checks in edit mode.
tooltips.droneRestrictionsDefaultOn: Turns the drone restriction layer on automatically when the map opens. If disabled, users can still enable it manually from the map layer control.
tooltips.droneRestrictionsStorageField: Optional text field on the same entity where saved restriction snapshots are written. Use a separate Text field such as droneRestrictionSnapshot. The geometry field remains pure GeoJSON.
tooltips.droneRestrictionsStoreByDefault: Pre-checks Store snapshot in edit mode. On save, the current polygon is checked against the live restriction service and only overlapping restrictions are stored in the configured snapshot field.
